can_do_obd: Yes
connection: OBD Only
bypass_cable: N/A
process_if_not_obd: N/A

can_do_obd: No - Working key dismantle required / Bench for AKL
connection: Working Key Dismantle + OBD (Add Key) / Bench FEM Removal + OBD (AKL)
bypass_cable: FEM/BDC Adapter / Yanhua ACDP FEM/BDC Module
process_if_not_obd: Add Key: Dismantle working key, read NXP chip with VVDI2 / ACDP, generate dealer key, learn via OBD | AKL: Bench read FEM module with ACDP / VVDI Prog, generate working key, program via OBD
notes: FEM/BDC Add Key requires working key reading | AKL requires bench reading FEM module

can_do_obd: No - Working key dismantle required / Bench for AKL
connection: Working Key Dismantle + OBD (Add Key) / Bench BDC3 Removal + OBD (AKL)
bypass_cable: BDC2/BDC3 Adapter / Yanhua ACDP BDC3 Module
process_if_not_obd: Add Key: Dismantle working key, read 8-pin chip / NXP with VVDI2 / Autel / Yanhua, generate dealer key, learn via OBD with ACDP/VVDI2 | AKL: Bench read BDC3 module with ACDP / VVDI Prog
notes: BDC3 Add Key: Dismantle WORKING KEY, read key data, generate dealer key, learn via OBD | AKL: Requires bench reading BDC3 module - High Risk
